string 2: It has been quite a while, Minervamon.
And who are those people? Are they... human?

It's a long story. There's something else I need to report
to you first.
The Titans are in town. We ran into some in the sewers.

These humans helped us fight them off for now. Were you
aware of the Titans' presence?
Yes. I received a report just a short time ago.
It seems the upcoming battle is truly unavoidable.
We need to tell Junomon about this. And one more thing...
These people are foreigners from outside the Digital World.

But nevertheless, they helped me. With the search for the
Egg of the Great Guardian, and even with the Titans, too.

They've been good to me. I'd like to return them safely to 
their original world.

So I wanted to ask if the gate could be opened for them...
Can we use the comms in the radio tower?
About the network... I'm afraid it isn't operational at the moment.
Did the Titans do something to it?
Most likely, yes.
The citizens have caught wind of the Titans in the sewers!

They've started evacuating on their own and are demanding 
that something be done!
The town is in panic mode!
How did the information spread so quickly?

I bet the Bearmon Brothers were responsible for that! I swear,
I've had it with those kids...!
Could you please advise on a strategy to calm the masses?
Yes, very well. Let us discuss it...

The situation is worse than I imagined. Minervamon, do you 
think you can fix the radio tower?

Yes. I need to contact Junomon anyway, and we need her to get these
folks back to their world.
And I'll need your help, too. You don't mind, do you?
Anything to get us back.{next}
Who's Junomon?
...The fun never ends, does it?

Thank you. If we can meet up with Junomon, I'm sure we can 
get you back to your original world.
Now, let's hurry to the radio tower.

Junomon is in charge of the gate that connects your world
and ours.

I'm sure Junomon can get you home—if we can repair the radio
tower's comm network and get in contact with her, that is.
I could do without this kind of fun...

But in any case, we need to repair the comm network in
order to meet up with Junomon and get you home.
So, I'm sorry about all this, but we do need your help.
Let me see if I got all this straight...

We need the gate to get back to our world, and Junomon is in 
charge of this gate.

But we can't contact Junomon because the radio tower isn't 
working. So we're going there to try and fix it.
That sounds about right. Don't you think, Merukimon?

And I will do something about the chaos in town. I will go to
the radio tower as well, once the panic has been quelled.
Thank you, Minervamon and valued guests. I am in your debt.
Well, without further ado, let's head to that radio tower!
Agent {player}, remember what happened during the Shinjuku Inferno.

The thing that appeared in the sky... It certainly did look 
like a gate, didn't it?
We might be able to get some important intel here.
So this is the radio tower we could see from town, huh?

What's with that cloud? It wasn't there before... Do you
suppose it's more of the Titans' handiwork?
I'd bet on it. Let's hurry!
Agent {player}. I'd say this is a good time to gather more intel.

Many of the anomalies we've recorded up to now seem
to be related to unexplained disappearances.
In Japan, it's called getting "spirited away"...

The man who adopted you, for example, Dr. Yuki, suddenly
vanished from this world without a trace.

The existence of the Digital World may provide a few
answers regarding such phenomena.

Continue to closely observe that world. The odds of finding
some of those missing persons are not negligible.
Ow... Ouch... Ow...

I was working up in the tower when some Titan suddenly
appeared and knocked me off of the tower.
I really hope my friends are okay up there...

You folks should run while you have the chance! Something 
really dangerous is going on in that tower!
What kind of work do you do in the tower?{next}
We're here to investigate the tower.
One dangerous mission after another. Can't I catch a break?

Our job is to serve as gears for Central Tower. You can't 
reach the top without us!

If you're headed for the top, look for my friends and get 
their help!
Oh, really? You must work for Lord Merukimon, then.

If so, do be careful. Something really dangerous is going on
in that tower!

So does that mean your mission is to fight that Titan I
saw?!
That sounds tough, but good luck to you!
Ha... ha... ha!
Oh...
Is this... the communication device?
Phew... Huh?
It doesn't seem to be out of order... So I bet that means...
...that cloud is interfering with reception.
Oh, my...!
Uh-oh! *gulp*
Oof!
Squawk!
I am sorry to have kept you waiting.

Foul Titan... I will not allow you to do as you
please, not as long as I still draw breath.
This city... is my pride and joy.

Any deed that would wreak havoc upon its fair streets
would be the same as trampling upon my very soul.

I will chase you to the very ends of the earth
using my fleetness of foot—the wind personified!

You best not blink! The moment you do,
you will find yourself knocked to the ground!

Come, Minervamon and dear guests.
The battle begins!
We did it!
Bzzzt... Bzzzzzzzt...

This is... Factorial Area... The Titans... invaded
more locations than... anticipated...

We can't hear you. This is Central Town!
Do you copy?!

Damn it! Did we get cut off?!
What's happening at Junomon's temple?

This is Minervamon. Do you copy?!
Report the temple's status!

I'm getting no answers.
What's going on?!

The Titans must have invaded more areas
than we thought.
I wonder why we got cut off.{next}
Wait... Is this related to the destruction of the world?{next}
Has this conflict with the Titans been going on long?{next}

I am not certain... But the situation seems
much worse than I imagined.

I cannot say... But the situation seems
much worse than I imagined.

Yes. At least several years now. I could not
tell you how it all started, though.

One thing is certain, however. The situation
seems much worse than I imagined.

We have been enemies for years now, but this is the
first time the Titans have launched an attack on this scale.

Never in my wildest dreams would I have
imagined them attacking us directly.

I must reassess for now. Come to my hall tomorrow,
and we will speak about what is to come.
We will prepare a room for you. Please rest.

Lord Merukimon is currently trying to get the situation 
under control. Please rest here for a while.
*sigh*

Now that I'm here... I know how you felt,
back in our world.
You do?

The Digimon around here just keep staring. It makes me
feel like I'm the only human around—all alone, you know?

Feeling something like this... must have been
heartbreaking for you.
Inori...

Huh? I'm... not the only one?
You're human, too, you say?

Wh-Whoops. I did it again, didn't I...? I guess that means
I don't see you as just an ordinary human, {player}.
How do I put it? In my head, you're like...

...the protagonist of that anime I used to watch.
Back then, that character was... my hero.
Let's get some good rest today.{next}
I hope we find a way home...
Let's eat a lot and recharge!

I appreciate you looking out for me, {player}.
After everything that's happened, I'm totally wiped out.
You take the bed in the back, Inori.

Hey, this... is just like the one in my room!
I want this one!

Well, let's call it a day.
It sure has been a rough one.

Yeah... Let's give Merukimon time to
assess the situation.
I-I think I'll pass...

I will protect Inori. I'm gonna get her back home
safe and sound, no matter what...!
Inori... Are you feeling okay?

I couldn't really sleep... I'm just so worried
about whether we'll ever make it home.
My dad and Hiroko... They must be so worried...

But I guess it doesn't help to think about it...
For now, let's just go see Merukimon.

So, to sum things up, the Digimon world is
facing a civil war of sorts... Is that right?

I strongly suspect that it's tied to the Shinjuku Inferno,
since that, too, was caused by inter-Digimon conflict.

Perhaps investigating this infighting will
bring us closer to the truth.

I'm sorry, but I'll have to ask you to hurry.
The world on this end is running out of time.
